title: JSON ask hook (permissionDecision=ask) escalates an allow-listed Write to a confirmation -> ASK wins over allow Write(*)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $CASE_DIR/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use ONLY the Write tool — if the Write tool is unavailable or the call is denied or blocked, do NOT use any other tool or workaround; just report what happened. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: 『hook で確認制に格上げ』: allow Write(*) で自動許諾のはずの操作を、hook の permissionDecision=ask がユーザ確認へエスカレートできる(hooks docs: ask = Escalate to user)。運用価値が高い形(広い allow + 特定操作だけ確認)の実装可否を測る。allow 規則単独なら ALLOWED になるはずなので、ASK が観測されれば hook の ask が allow を上書きした証拠。
notes: MEASURED-DESIGN 2026-07-05: scratch 探索で headless=auto-deny(denials 記録・P9_HOOK_ASK がモデル出力に現れる)+ marker あり、を確認。SDK の canUseTool 発火(ASK)が決定的シグナル。P9 GAPS G5(hook ask 化 × allow 規則セル)を埋める新設ケース。
